reach_why: It cautions against overclaiming AI discovery, but stays within established skepticism about self-evaluation and validation.
novelty_why: It links ontology misalignment, evaluator drift, and external validation into one critique of apparent machine discovery.
falsifiable_why: Claims about evaluator stability, ontology mismatch, and validation dependence can be operationalized and empirically tested.
explanation: AI-generated thought experiments are only candidates, not knowledge, without stable evaluation and external empirical validation.
